## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's potential keynote presentation and sponsorship opportunities for the upcoming AI Engineer Summit.](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI is interested in a keynote slot, focusing on post-training AI and its relevance to coding tools](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [The summit in November is primarily code-focused; a data-centric event next spring might be more relevant for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [George will provide AI coding-focused titles, presentation outline, and co-presenter details for consideration](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Alternative sponsorship options (e.g., Platinum sponsorship, lanyards) were briefly discussed but not decided upon](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Topics

### Event Focus and Relevance

  - [November summit: Coding agents and code data-centric](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Surge AI's focus on post-training AI might need tailoring to fit the event theme](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Data-focused summit planned for next spring, potentially more relevant for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [George's perspective: Surge represents the "data people" in the AI ecosystem (model makers, builders, data people)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

### Keynote Speaker Lineup

  - [Major AI labs confirmed (Anthropic, OpenAI)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [AI coding tools represented (Cursor, Factory, Augment Code)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Other speakers: McKinsey, Goldman Sachs (customer-facing perspective)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Mostly CEOs or senior executives presenting](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

### Surge AI's Proposed Keynote

  - [Focus: Post-training AI, potentially tailored to coding applications](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Unique selling point: Edwin's expertise in post-training, differentiating from competitors like Mercor](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Proposal to bring a current customer (AI coding tool) on stage](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Need for strongly stated opinions, TED Talk-style presentation](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Duration: Typically 20 minutes, optimized for YouTube reach](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Presentation Format

  - [Initial idea of fireside chat discouraged (deflates room energy)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Preference for co-presenting with a customer rather than unstructured discussion](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Emphasis on interactive, opinionated content](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### Sponsorship Opportunities

  - [Morning workshop no longer available (sold out)](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Platinum sponsorship option: Includes workshop, booth with stage, two booth sessions](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Lanyard sponsorship still available](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Next Steps for Surge AI

  - [Provide AI coding-focused titles and presentation outline](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Confirm and share co-presenter details](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Consider NDA requirements for customer involvement](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Formal response on Platinum sponsorship interest](https://fathom.video/share/pas_t6oXeVtWwwnxxdq3NUg_sTadD6mW?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
